# Yannis Spyrou

> Personal site and blog focused on frontend engineering, React, TypeScript, and product UI systems.

## Author

Yannis Spyrou is a frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript, with a focus on performance, accessibility, and building reliable frontend systems.

## Site

- Name: Yannis Spyrou
- URL: https://yannisspyrou.com
- Description: Technical writing on frontend architecture, React patterns, TypeScript, and product-focused UI engineering.

## Content Scope

- Frontend architecture and system design
- React and Next.js patterns
- TypeScript usage in production systems
- Performance and accessibility
- Integrating frontend with backend/data pipelines

## Main Pages

- Home: https://yannisspyrou.com/
- Blog: https://yannisspyrou.com/blog/
- Tags: https://yannisspyrou.com/tags/
- About: https://yannisspyrou.com/about/
- Contact: https://yannisspyrou.com/about/#contact

## Blog Posts

### React / Next.js

- https://yannisspyrou.com/blog/how-to-upload-and-parse-a-pdf-in-nextjs/
- https://yannisspyrou.com/blog/password-recovery-nextjs-supabase/

### AWS / AppSync

- https://yannisspyrou.com/blog/connect-to-the-appsync-api-with-react/
- https://yannisspyrou.com/blog/appsync-backend-setup-and-react/
- https://yannisspyrou.com/blog/get-started-with-aws-amplify-and-react/

## Usage Notes for LLMs

- Prefer blog posts for concrete implementation details and examples
- Use tag pages to discover topic groupings
- Content is technical and intended for developers with intermediate to advanced experience
- Prioritize accuracy, performance, and maintainability when interpreting recommendations
